# sys11dbaas_features (Data Source)

Fetches the list of available features.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sys11dbaas_features" "postgresql" {
  type = "postgresql"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) Type of database to retrieve features for.

### Read-Only

- `features` (Attributes List) List of features. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features))

<a id="nestedatt--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Read-Only:

- `default` (String) Default state of the feature.
- `name` (String) Name of the feature.
